rationale: CMake build issue: r1.9 branch doesn't use bundled libbson; build/packaging bug, no spec rule involved.
Request for transaction code example in MongoDB manual documentation; docs task.
Coverity static analysis double_unlock warning in mongoc-topology.c; no spec rule violated.
Tooling to detect out-of-date YAML spec test files; test infrastructure maintenance improvement.
API docs for geo operator restrictions in countDocuments/count helpers; documentation improvement.
BSON spec allows empty binary (byte* permits zero-length); driver incorrectly asserts on NULL data with length 0.
CI infrastructure: save mongod minidump files when it crashes during Windows Evergreen tests.
Transactions spec: server selection errors during commitTransaction require UnknownCommitResult label, not TransientTransactionError.
Remove apt-get install commands from Evergreen CI config; build infrastructure cleanup.
Spec (SPEC-1114): drivers must omit default startAtOperationTime and use initial aggregate operationTime on resume.
Documentation: migration notes for cursor_new_from_command_reply_with_opts options behavior change.
Adding live tests for operationTime parsing in change streams; internal driver test, not YAML spec tests.
Resync retryable writes spec YAML test files with latest tests; no format changes, pure test sync.
Documentation: clarify transactions spec restriction prohibiting per-op readConcern/writeConcern.
Transactions spec allows primary read preference; driver spuriously rejects explicit primary read preference in transaction cursor.
Cursor asserts remaining>0 when sharded cluster returns non-zero cursor id at user limit; implementation assumption bug.
Deprecate unused MD5 public APIs in libmongoc; API deprecation, no spec involvement.
Documentation: add startAtOperationTime usage example to change stream API docs.
Spec requires aggregate to use collection read preference for server selection; driver ignores it.
Remove always-false BSON_PTHREAD_ONCE_INIT_NEEDS_BRACES config check; dead code cleanup.
Server selection error test file is commented out (#if 0) and never runs; dead test code to fix.
bson_iter functions handle empty keys inconsistently; internal C API bug, no explicit BSON spec rule cited.
Documentation: unclear createIndexes guide, request for mongoc_collection_get_database API addition.
Spec change: only send bypassDocumentValidation when true; driver sends it unconditionally.
Flaky timing assertion in bson_oid_get_time_t test under Valgrind; test reliability issue.
Resync SDAM spec test corpus with mixed case hostname test cases; DRIVERS-479 coordination.
Missing MONGOC_EXPORT macro for mongoc_collection_replace_one on Windows; build/export issue.
Spelling fixes across source files; no functional changes.
Remove meaningless noauth-sasl-nossl CI task combination; CI configuration cleanup.
GridFS implementation silently ignores write errors during chunk upload; errors must be propagated per spec.
GridFS readv asserts on corrupted chunk larger than chunkSize; robustness issue, no specific spec rule violated.
Documentation: finish documenting opts for find_databases, find_collections, get_collection_names with_opts functions.
Document and assert that find_and_modify_with_opts requires non-NULL opts; docs/API hardening.
CRUD spec: bulk write models don't support bypassDocumentValidation; driver incorrectly accepts and sometimes applies it.
Mock server happy_eyeballs test fails under code coverage instrumentation; CI reliability issue.
New libbson API (bson_iter_init_from_data_and_offset) to let C++ driver avoid using bson_iter_t internals.
maxTimeMS appended as int32 instead of int64; implementation type detail, no specific spec rule cited.
bson_iter_visit_all documentation is incorrect and needs updating; documentation bug.
GCC 8 compiler warnings in bson-iso8601.c and bson-json.c; build warning cleanup.
Spec: user-provided readConcern in opts must override collection default; find_with_opts uses collection's instead.
Spec: opts readConcern overrides collection; change stream watch duplicates fields, collection readConcern wins incorrectly.
Spec: inherit collection writeConcern when none provided in opts; create_index uses default writeConcern instead.
Add ASAN CI variant and reduce Valgrind batch time; CI configuration improvement.
Command monitoring spec: unacknowledged OP_MSG writes must emit CommandSucceededEvent with ok:1 reply; driver omits it.
Spec: aggregate inherits collection writeConcern when $out present; broken when pipeline is bare BSON array.
CI failure: SSL certificate purpose validation error prevents sharded replica set initialization in Evergreen.
Code refactor: share threading config #defines between libbson and libmongoc in src/common.
DNS seedlist: Windows DnsQuery_UTF8 returns non-TXT records; driver crashes reading uninitialized fields instead of skipping.
Adding tests for existing mongoc_bulk_operation_set_client_session; internal test coverage improvement.
API consistency fix: change_stream_error_document should null doc when no error, matching cursor API; no spec rule cited.
